revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:伊富利部神社]] {{Expand Japanese|伊富利部神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Ifuribe Shrine | native_name = 伊富利部神社 | image = Ifuribe shrine.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ifuribe Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.338698|136.796673}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Ifuribe Shrine'''|伊富利部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province|ja|尾張国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11465292|1=List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province}} ** Series ordinal: 47 ** P155: {{ill|Q135039494|ltq=Q135039494|qid=Q135039494|1=Kahashimano Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q11436767|ltq=Q11436767|qid=Q11436767|1=Ōke Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|lt=Ichinomiya|ar|إيتشينوميا (آيتشي)|arz|ايتشينوميا|azb|ایچینومیا، آیچی|az|İçinomiya|bg|Ичиномия|ceb|Ichinomiya (lungsod sa Hapon)|ce|Итиномия|ckb|ئیچینۆمیا، ئایچی|cs|Ičinomija (Aiči)|dag|Ichinomiya|de|Ichinomiya (Aichi)|en|Ichinomiya, Aichi|envoyage|Ichinomiya|eo|Iĉinomija|es|Ichinomiya (Aichi)|eu|Ichinomiya (Aichi)|fa|ایچینومیا، آیچی|favoyage|ایچینومیا، آیچی|fi|Ichinomiya|fr|Ichinomiya|ga|Ichinomiya|gl|Ichinomiya|hy|Իչինոմիա|id|Ichinomiya, Aichi|it|Ichinomiya|ja|一宮市|javoyage|一宮市|ka|იტინომია|kk|Итиномия|ko|이치노미야시|lt|Ičinomija|mg|Ichinomiya|mzn|ایچینومیا، آیچی|nl|Ichinomiya (Aichi)|no|Ichinomiya|pl|Ichinomiya|pt|Owari-ichinomiya|ro|Ichinomiya, Aichi|ru|Итиномия|sh|Ichinomija|simple|Ichinomiya, Aichi|sr|Ичиномија|sv|Ichinomiya|tg|Ичиномия|th|อิจิโนมิยะ (จังหวัดไอจิ)|tl|Ichinomiya, Aichi|tr|Ichinomiya|tt|Итиномия|uk|Ітіномія (Айті)|ur|اچینومیا، ایچی|vi|Ichinomiya, Aichi|war|Ichinomiya, Aichi|wuu|一宫市|zh_classical|一宮市|zh_min_nan|Itinomiya-chhī|zh_yue|一宮|zh|一宮市|qid=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}} * {{ill|Q514506|ltq=Q514506|qid=Q514506|1=Owari Province}} * {{ill|Haguri District|lt=Haguri district|en|Haguri District|hu|Haguri körzet|ja|葉栗郡|ko|하구리군 (아이치현)|pl|Powiat Haguri|sr|Област Хагури|zh|葉栗郡|qid=Q1032507|1=Haguri District}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.338698|136.796673}} == image (P18) == * Ifuribe shrine.jpg == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181387 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q90139226|ltq=Q90139226|qid=Q90139226|1=Ken-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * Dineʼé Bikéyah|ny|Japan|oc|Japon|olo|Japounii|om|Jaappaan|or|ଜାପାନ|os|Япон|pag|Hapon|pam|Hapon|pap|Hapon|pa|ਜਪਾਨ|pcd|Japon|pcm|Japan|pdc|Japan|pfl|Japan|pl|Japonia|plnews|Kategoria:Japonia|plquote|Japonia|plvoyage|Japonia|pms|Giapon|pnb|جاپان|pnt|Ιαπωνία|ps|جاپان|pt|Japão|ptnews|Categoria:Japão|ptquote|Japão|ptvoyage|Japão|pwn|Dripun|qu|Hapun|rm|Giapun|rmy|Japan|rn|Yapon|roa_rup|Japonia|roa_tara|Giappone|ro|Japonia|ronews|Categorie:Japonia|rovoyage|Japonia|rue|Японія|ru|Япония|runews|Категория:Япония|ruvoyage|Япония|rw|Ubuyapani|sah|Дьоппуон|sat|ᱡᱟᱯᱟᱱ|sa|जपान्|scn|Giappuni|sco|Japan|sc|Giapone|sd|جاپان|se|Jáhpan|sg|Zapöo|shn|မိူင်းၵျႃႇပၢၼ်ႇ|sh|Japan|simple|Japan|si|ජපානය|skr|جاپان|sk|Japonsko|sl|Japonska|smn|Jaapaan|sm|Iapani|sn|Japani|so|Jabaan|sq|Japonia|sqnews|Kategoria:Japoni|srn|Japan|sr|Јапан|srnews|Категорија:Јапан|srquote|Јапан|ss|IJapani|stq|Japan|st|Japane|su|Jepang|sv|Japan|svnews|Kategori:Japan|svvoyage|Japan|sw|Japani|syl|ꠎꠣꠙꠣꠘ|szl|Japůńijo|szy|Zipun|ta|யப்பான்|tanews|பகுப்பு:ஜப்பான்|tay|Gipun|tcy|ಜಪಾನ್|tdd|ᥛᥫᥒᥰ ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 5180005010286 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市木曽川町門間字北屋敷3714番地', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:伊富利部神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11379320}} == Japanese content == {{Citation needed|date=2014-10-26 (Sun) 04:19 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称=Ifuribe Shrine |画像=[[File:Ifuribe shrine.jpg|250px]] |所在地={{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|qid=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|qid=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}{{ill|lt=Kisogawa Town|Q6416838|qid=Q6416838|1=Kisogawa, Aichi}}Monma Aza Kitayashiki 3714 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakatsuho-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q317997|lt=Hondawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin|qid=Q317997}} |社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (small)
former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=kensha|1=Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226}} |創建=Unknown |本殿= |別名= Shō Hachimangū (old name) |札所等= |例祭= {{ill|lt=October 8|Q2924|qid=Q2924|1=October 8}} |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Ifuribe
Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ifuribe Shrine''' (いふりべじんじゃ / いほりべじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|qid=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|qid=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}} (former {{ill|lt=Kisogawa Town|Q6416838|qid=Q6416838|1=Kisogawa, Aichi}} in {{ill|lt=Haguri District|Q1032507|qid=Q1032507|1=Haguri District}}). Its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|qid=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was kensha. It is also called '''Ifuribe Shrine''' with a variant character. It is identified with "Ifuribe Shrine" of Haguri District, {{ill|lt=Owari Province|Q514506|qid=Q514506|1=Owari Province}}, in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. ===Enshrined deities=== ; Main deity * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakatsuho-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} (ワカツホノミコト) - descendant of {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Hoakari-no-Mikoto|Q10940411|qid=Q10940411|1=Amenohoakari}}, said to be a deity related to metal smelting. ; Associated deity * {{ill|lt=Hachiman deity|Q261637|qid=Q261637|qid=Q317997|lt=Hondawake-no-Mikoto|1=Hachiman}} (ホンダワケノミコト) === History === This shrine is related to the Ifuribe clan (Ifukibe clan). One theory says the Ifuribe clan moved from {{ill|lt=Katsuragi-yama|Q11620894|qid=Q11620894|1=Mount Katsuragi}} in {{ill|lt=Yamato Province|Q907495|qid=Q907495|1=Yamato Province}} to this area of Owari and enshrined their ancestors. In the {{ill|lt=Jinshin War|Q2378252|qid=Q2378252|1=Jinshin War}} of {{ill|lt=672|Q30601|qid=Q30601|1=672}}, the Ifuribe clan of Owari supported {{ill|lt=Emperor Tenmu|Q335181|qid=Q335181|lt=Prince Ōama|1=Emperor Tenmu}}, so Ifuribe Shrine is inferred to predate that war. From late {{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|qid=Q193292|1=Heian period}} onward, under influence of Hachiman faith, Hondawake-no-Mikoto was merged and the name was changed to Shō Hachimangū. It is said to have once been a large shrine with a one-ri surrounding precinct, but in {{ill|lt=1455|Q6480|qid=Q6480|1=1455}} ({{ill|lt=Kōshō|Q1143364|qid=Q1143364|1=Kōshō}} 1) shrine buildings burned, and the precinct shrank. Later, in {{ill|lt=1556|Q6590|qid=Q6590|1=1556}} ({{ill|lt=Kōji (Japan)|Q1143910|qid=Q1143910|lt=Kōji|1=Kōji (Muromachi period)}} 2), it moved to the present location, and in {{ill|lt=1582|Q6719|qid=Q6719|1=1582}} ({{ill|lt=Tenshō|Q1145058|qid=Q1145058|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 10), rebuilt by {{ill|lt=Sawai Katsushige|Q11553123|qid=Q11553123|1=Sawai Katsushige}} (retainer of {{ill|lt=Oda Nobukatsu|Q3044815|qid=Q3044815|1=Oda Nobukatsu}}), lord of {{ill|lt=Kuroda Castle (Owari)|Q11678587|qid=Q11678587|lt=Kuroda Castle|1=Kuroda Castle}}, as guardian shrine of Kuroda Castle. In {{ill|lt=1874|Q7761|qid=Q7761|1=1874}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 7), it was renamed Ifuribe Shrine and became gōsha, and in {{ill|lt=1929|Q18792|qid=Q18792|1=1929}} ({{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|qid=Q327567|1=Shōwa era}} 4) was promoted to kensha. === Cultural properties === === Ichinomiya City designated tangible cultural properties === * Wooden komainu (sculpture) * Old sword (iron sword fragment, craft) * Parent lion head (craft) * Waniguchi gong (craft) - inscribed with {{ill|lt=Shiba Yoshizumi|Q11500866|qid=Q11500866|1=Shiba Yoshiatsu}} and {{ill|lt=Shōchō|Q1193070|qid=Q1193070|1=Shōchō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=1428|Q6315|qid=Q6315|1=1428}}) * Armor (craft) - said to have been worn by {{ill|lt=Hitotsuyanagi Naomori|Q11352871|qid=Q11352871|1=Hitotsuyanagi Naomori}} * Hanging lantern (craft) - donated by {{ill|lt=Tokugawa Yoshinao|Q1136186|qid=Q1136186|1=Tokugawa Yoshinao}} * Ifuribe Kofun (historic site) === Local information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|qid=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q270810|qid=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}{{ill|lt=Kisogawa Town|Q6416838|qid=Q6416838|1=Kisogawa, Aichi}}Monma Aza Kitayashiki 3714 ;Transportation * About 30 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Shin-Kisogawa Station|Q7497108|qid=Q7497108|1=Shin-Kisogawa Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Nagoya Main Line|Q1137838|qid=Q1137838|lt=Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line|1=Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line}}. * About 30 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kisogawa Station|Q871019|qid=Q871019|1=Kisogawa Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tōkaidō Main Line|Q1190152|qid=Q1190152|1=Tōkaidō Main Line}} * About 20 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397|qid=Q6810397|1=Meitetsu Bus}} "Oke" bus stop ** from {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589|qid=Q2856589|1=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station}} on {{ill|lt=Meitetsu|Q30850|qid=Q30850|1=Meitetsu}} {{ill|lt=Nagoya Main Line|Q1137838|qid=Q1137838|lt=Nagoya Main Line|1=Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line}} / {{ill|lt=Bisai Line|Q901005|qid=Q901005|lt=Bisai Line|1=Meitetsu Bisai Line}}, and from {{ill|lt=Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495|qid=Q871495|1=Owari-Ichinomiya Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tōkaidō Main Line|Q1190152|qid=Q1190152|1=Tōkaidō Main Line}} (Meitetsu Ichinomiya Bus Terminal platform 3), bound for "Yamago Nishi" / "{{ill|lt=Twin Arch 138|Q11318660|qid=Q11318660|lt=138 Tower Park|1=Twin Arch 138}}" * From {{ill|lt=i-Bus|Q11223722|qid=Q11223722|1=I-Bus}} Kisogawa/Kitagata course "{{ill|lt=Ichinomiya Kisogawa Gymnasium|UNKNOWN|lt=Kisogawa Gymnasium}}" stop, about 15 minutes on foot === Notes ===
